SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore.jdbc

Class SnapshotStoreJdbc

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore.jdbc.SnapshotStoreJdbc
All Implemented Interfaces:
SnapshotStore
public class SnapshotStoreJdbc extends Object implements SnapshotStore
Durable SnapshotStore backed by a single JDBC table — the store=jdbc option for the shared-store tier, so cluster aggregation survives a dashboard restart. Same semantics as the in-memory store (latest snapshot per instance, liveness window, max-instances warning) but persisted; the MetricsSummary is stored as JSON.

Table (INSTANCE_ID PK, RECEIVED_AT BIGINT, SUMMARY_JSON CLOB), named <tablePrefix> + BASE_TABLE (the prefix is validated — letters/digits/underscore only — since it is concatenated into SQL). Upsert is a portable update-then-insert (no dialect-specific MERGE); autoDdl creates the table on startup if missing. Stores only aggregate, non-sensitive failover metrics — never business data — so a single shared table is sufficient (no multi-tenancy; use tablePrefix to namespace).

Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    BASE_TABLE
    Base (unprefixed) table name; the configured table-prefix is prepended.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<MetricsSummary>
    live()
    The freshest snapshot per instance whose age is within the liveness window.
    int
    liveCount()
    Number of instances currently reporting (live within the liveness window).
    List<InstanceMetrics>
    liveInstances()
    The live snapshots as per-instance entries (id + last-seen + that instance's summary), for the dashboard's Instances view.
    long
    newestEpochMs()
    Epoch-millis of the most recent live snapshot, or 0 when none are live.
    void
    upsert(ClusterSnapshot snapshot)
    Records (or replaces) the latest snapshot for the snapshot's instance, stamping the current receive time.

    • liveInstances

      public List<InstanceMetrics> liveInstances()
      Description copied from interface: SnapshotStore
      The live snapshots as per-instance entries (id + last-seen + that instance's summary), for the dashboard's Instances view. Same liveness filtering as SnapshotStore.live().
      Specified by:
      liveInstances in interface SnapshotStore
      Returns:
      one InstanceMetrics per live instance
